sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince's optimal f: Position size = f where f = Mathematical Expectation / B (B = win amount / loss amount). Applicable when all losses are equal and win/loss amounts are symmetrical. Requires calculation of expectation and payoff ratio as inputs.

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined by the optimal fixed fraction (f), calculated as the ratio of mathematical expectation to the win/loss ratio, when all losses are equal amounts.
